title: Scope grant (ReBAC tuple)
description: Lean tracker-native ReBAC (per /task/724 research: Authentik groups = coarse tiers + per-resource tuples; OpenFGA/SpiceDB not adopted at this scale). Checks are zookie-fenced so a revoke is never read stale. Enforcement: query-layer scope injection + Postgres RLS backstop + op-router lane checks.

subject.description: Principal id (parker, agent:janet) or tier:<name> (grants to every member of the tier).

relation.description: viewer=read; editor=item mutation; operator=command-plane ops in the object namespace; owner=grant/revoke + destructive ops.

object.description: A scope tag (user:parker, project:console, fleet, restricted:health), an item ref (item:<id>), or an op namespace (op:agent.*).

condition.description: Optional guard (e.g. propose_only — mutations route to the tracker suggestion queue).

invalid_at.description: Expiry; expired grants are dead, not deleted (audit).

zookie.description: Monotonic consistency token minted on every grant-set change.
